chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S- 170 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A.No. 1170/2025. (urgent application) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.1171 2025. (exemption Application) 4. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2025 Mr. Jahanzeb Khan advocate for the Applicant along with Applicant. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption application is allowed subject to all exceptions. 4. Through instant Criminal Bail Application, Applicant Muhammad Jahanzaib seeks protective bail in FIR No.58/2025 registered at PS Bilal Colony for offences under sections 499, 500, 34 PPC Learned Counsel states that the Applicant has been falsely implicated in this case and wants to surrender before the Court concerned for seeking pre-arrest bail but apprehends unjust and malafide arrest and requests for protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case, applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of 12 days from today subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- and P.R bond in like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 12 days from today or on the date the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court whichever occurs earlier; in case of failure, the bail bond executed by the applicant shall stand forfeited automatically. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Ali Haider
